title: athyrium × pseudopinetorum
intro: Athyrium × pseudopinetorum, also known as the Lady Fern, is a hybrid species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Athyrium × pseudopinetorum include reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
